title: aspidium setosum
intro: Aspidium setosum, also known as the autumn fern or autumnal fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to Asia and is commonly found in mountainous regions, where it thrives in shaded and humid environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Aspidium setosum include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting overall well-being, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction.
